3092190.name: Our Home, My Keeper
3092190.description:
Paige Crowley has a dilemma. Following the success of her recent series of children’s books, Paige has found herself struggling with a particularly persistent strain of writer’s block.

Fearful that her creative energy has gone for good, Paige decides to use her newly accrued cash to move out of the ever-busy London and into a quaint old home buried deep in the English countryside.

Paige hopes that a change of pace will reverse her fortunes, and she’ll finally be able to write a new fantasy epic her fans will adore…

But Paige gets rather more than she bargained for when she discovers her lovely new home already has an occupant. A brownie called Faye lives there, and she has been watching over the home for centuries.

Paige must learn to get along with her mysterious, other-worldly housemate – and, in the process, they may even fall in love.

features:

  • around 85k words of text (approx 4-8 hours of reading)

  • a linear narrative with no choices or branches

  • lots of detailed character artwork

  • a beautiful original soundtrack

  • a cute and wholesome yuri romance

  • a heroine with ball-jointed limbs

  • mystery and intrigue!

  • frilly dresses!
